changelog: FIX (DEV ONLY): The new 'PPV & LIVE SPORTS' page no longer crashes the app on open. Root cause: Moshi's reflection JSON adapter rejected the wire models because they were carrying a stale `@JsonClass(generateAdapter = true)` annotation that's only valid with kapt codegen (we don't use kapt). Removed the annotations, hardened the parse path with double-nested runCatching + logcat reporting, and removed a redundant outer `.focusable()` on the league-pill row that violated the v1.43.98 focus rule.
Sports section now degrades gracefully: if the schedule fails to load you see the placeholder 'Loading the schedule…' instead of a hard crash.
OFFICIAL channel still on v1.43.99 — Sports stays Dev-only until Phase 3 (admin panel) is signed off.
